mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.user_id, f.goods_id, f.add_time, f.referrer, g.NAME, g.list_pic_url, g.goods_brief AS goods_brief, g.retail_price AS retail_price FROM mall_footprint f INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(id) AS id FROM mall_footprint WHERE user_id = #{0} GROUP BY goods_id ) latest ON latest.id = f.id LEFT JOIN mall_goods g ON f.goods_id = g.id ORDER BY f.id DESC
